questions.question: Where should you go if you have forgotten your Notion password?

options.text: The Status page
options.explanation: The Status page is for checking system issues, not resetting passwords.

options.text: Notion Settings
options.explanation: You must reset your password via the login page, not directly from Settings.

options.text: notion.so/login in your web browser
options.explanation: This is the correct starting point to initiate the password reset process.

options.text: Your email inbox
options.explanation: Your inbox receives the reset link, but you must click it from the login page.

questions.question: What happens immediately after you open the password reset link sent to your email?

options.text: You are taken to the Status page to report an issue
options.explanation: The link directs you to the Settings workspace within your Notion account.

options.text: You are taken to Settings where you can set a new password
options.explanation: The link opens the Settings workspace, allowing you to create a new password.

options.text: Your temporary login codes are deleted automatically
options.explanation: Temporary codes remain available unless you choose to set a new password.

options.text: You must enter your credit card details to verify your account
options.explanation: Password resets do not require payment or credit card verification.

questions.question: What is the outcome if you do not set a new password during the reset process?

options.text: Your account will be permanently locked
options.explanation: Your password is simply removed, allowing you to log in using temporary codes.

options.text: You will be sent a new password by email
options.explanation: Notion does not email you a new password; you must create one.

options.text: You must contact support to regain access
options.explanation: You can still log in using temporary codes without contacting support.

options.text: Your password will be removed and you can log in using temporary codes
options.explanation: According to the article, skipping the password creation step leaves your password removed but allows temporary code login.

questions.question: To change your email address, you must first navigate to which section of the sidebar?

options.text: Account Security
options.explanation: Account Security is the destination, not the starting sidebar section.

options.text: Settings in the sidebar → {your name}
options.explanation: You must click on Settings in the sidebar, then select your specific name.

options.text: Workspace Settings
options.explanation: The instructions specify navigating to Settings in the sidebar, not Workspace Settings.

options.text: Login page
options.explanation: The process is handled within the Notion application interface, not the login page.

questions.question: What is the prerequisite required to change your email address if you have lost access to your original one?

options.text: Access to your old email address
options.explanation: You are changing the email because you lost access to the old one.

options.text: A permanent password already set for your account
options.explanation: The article explicitly states you need to have a permanent password already set.

options.text: A temporary login code
options.explanation: You need a permanent password to verify your identity for the change.

options.text: Contact with Notion Support
options.explanation: You can perform this action yourself if you have the permanent password.

questions.question: What is the correct order of actions when changing your email address?

options.text: Enter password → Enter new email → Send code → Enter code → Change email
options.explanation: This matches the exact sequence described in the article.

options.text: Enter new email → Send code → Enter password → Enter code → Change email
options.explanation: You must verify your identity with the old password before entering the new email.

options.text: Enter password → Enter code → Enter new email → Send code → Change email
options.explanation: You send the verification code before entering the new email address.

options.text: Enter code → Enter password → Enter new email → Send code → Change email
options.explanation: You cannot receive a code before sending the request from the new email.

questions.question: Where can you check for live updates on any known Notion service issues?

options.text: The X (Twitter) account
options.explanation: The article lists X (Twitter) as a source for live status updates.

options.text: The Login page
options.explanation: The login page is for authentication, not status updates.

options.text: The Help Center
options.explanation: While helpful, the specific tool mentioned for live updates is the Status page.

options.text: Your browser console
options.explanation: Browser consoles are for developers, not general status checking.

questions.question: What should you do if you are still having trouble logging in after following the steps?

options.text: Refresh the page and try again
options.explanation: Refreshing is not a solution for account access issues.

options.text: Contact us at support@notion.so
options.explanation: The article explicitly directs users to contact support if they are still stuck.

options.text: Delete your account and create a new one
options.explanation: This is a drastic measure not suggested in the troubleshooting article.

options.text: Wait 24 hours
options.explanation: Waiting is not a troubleshooting step; you should contact support for assistance.
